title: Thai Peanut Salmon with Veg & Rice
description: Asian-inspired salmon with a rich peanut sauce, steamed vegetables, and brown rice.

title: Vietnamese Lemongrass Chicken Bowl
description: High-protein Vietnamese-style chicken bowl with fragrant lemongrass, fresh vegetables, and brown rice.

title: Mediterranean Turkey & Lentil Stuffed Peppers
description: High-protein Mediterranean stuffed peppers with lean turkey mince, lentils, and herbs baked until golden.

title: Japanese Miso Cod with Quinoa & Sesame Vegetables
description: Lean baked cod glazed in miso served with quinoa and sesame stir-fried vegetables.

title: Spanish Tuna, White Bean & Avocado Bowl
description: A no-cook Mediterranean bowl packed with protein-rich tuna and white beans, creamy avocado, and a bright lemon dressing.

title: Korean Sesame Prawn & Edamame Soba Bowl
description: Silky soba noodles tossed with juicy pan-fried prawns, edamame, and a punchy sesame-soy glaze.

title: Greek Scrambled Egg & Feta Pitta
description: Fluffy scrambled eggs with crumbled feta, wilted spinach, and cherry tomatoes served in a warm wholemeal pitta.

title: Sweet Soy Salmon Noodles with Pan-Fried Bell Pepper
description: Heart-healthy salmon in a sweet soy and hoisin marinade tossed with egg noodles, bell pepper, and a kick of sweet chilli.

title: Teriyaki Pork Rice Bowl
description: Fragrant jasmine rice topped with savoury teriyaki pork mince, tender broccolini, and kale with a sesame soy drizzle.

title: Ketjap Manis Glazed Chicken Tacos with Charred Corn Salad
description: Juicy pan-seared chicken glazed in sweet ketjap manis served in warm tortillas with charred corn, fresh tomato salad, and crème fraîche.

title: Chilli Garlic Prawn Noodles with Teriyaki Veg & Crunchy Peanuts
description: Juicy prawns marinated in chilli and garlic tossed with egg noodles, pak choi, and bell pepper in a teriyaki soy sauce, topped with crushed peanuts.

title: Teriyaki Beef Salad with Sweet Chilli Couscous
description: Tender sliced beef rump in a teriyaki glaze served over sweet chilli couscous with fresh cucumber, tomato, and scallion.

title: Spicy Tofu Bibimbap with Mushrooms & Pickled Carrot
description: Korean rice bowl topped with crispy soy-glazed tofu, sautéed kale and mushrooms, quick-pickled carrot ribbons, and a gochujang sesame drizzle.

title: Thai Style Chicken Curry with Courgette & Fragrant Rice
description: Creamy, fragrant Thai red curry with tender diced chicken and courgette simmered in coconut milk, served over lime-zested jasmine rice.
